'''âj-p-n''' ('''kajapan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbump|headbump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbump|headbump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kajapan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapan|thijapan]] || [[word:jijapan|jijapan]] || [[word:shijapan|shijapan]] || [[word:kijapan|kijapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapan|thuthujapan]] || [[word:jujujapan|jujujapan]] || [[word:shushujapan|shushujapan]] || [[word:kukujapan|kukujapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujapan|thujapan]] || [[word:jujapan|jujapan]] || [[word:shujapan|shujapan]] || [[word:kujapan|kujapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujapan|thujapan]] || [[word:jujapan|jujapan]] || [[word:shujapan|shujapan]] || [[word:kujapan|kujapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejapan|thejapan]] || [[word:jejapan|jejapan]] || [[word:shejapan|shejapan]] || [[word:kejapan|kejapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojapan|thothojapan]] || [[word:jojojapan|jojojapan]] || [[word:shoshojapan|shoshojapan]] || [[word:kokojapan|kokojapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojapan|thojapan]] || [[word:jojapan|jojapan]] || [[word:shojapan|shojapan]] || [[word:kojapan|kojapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojapan|thojapan]] || [[word:jojapan|jojapan]] || [[word:shojapan|shojapan]] || [[word:kojapan|kojapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjapan|thĂŠjapan]] || [[word:jĂŠjapan|jĂŠjapan]] || [[word:shĂŠjapan|shĂŠjapan]] || [[word:kĂŠjapan|kĂŠjapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajapan|thathajapan]] || [[word:jajajapan|jajajapan]] || [[word:shashajapan|shashajapan]] || [[word:kakajapan|kakajapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajapan|thajapan]] || [[word:jajapan|jajapan]] || [[word:shajapan|shajapan]] || [[word:kajapan|kajapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajapan|thajapan]] || [[word:jajapan|jajapan]] || [[word:shajapan|shajapan]] || [[word:kajapan|kajapan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajapan|shajapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajapan|goshajapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajapan|gokishajapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajapanĂŒ|shajapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajapanknĂŒ|goshajapanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajapanĂŒ|gokishajapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajapanshĂ«|shajapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajapankshĂ«|goshajapankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajapanshĂ«|gokishajapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajapanro|shajapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajapankro|goshajapankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajapanro|gokishajapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajapanmu|shajapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajapankmu|goshajapankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajapanmu|gokishajapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajapansher|shajapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajapanksher|goshajapanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajapansher|gokishajapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajapang|shajapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajapankng|goshajapankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajapang|gokishajapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajapanya|shajapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajapankya|goshajapankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajapanya|gokishajapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajapanyam|shajapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajapankyam|goshajapankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajapanyam|gokishajapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajapanĂŒshĂ«|shajapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajapanknĂŒshĂ«|goshajapanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajapanĂŒshĂ«|gokishajapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajapanĂŒro|shajapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajapanknĂŒro|goshajapanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajapanĂŒro|gokishajapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajapanĂŒmu|shajapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajapanknĂŒmu|goshajapanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajapanĂŒmu|gokishajapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajapanshĂ«nĂŒ|shajapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajapankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajapankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajapanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajapanshĂ«ro|shajapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajapankshĂ«ro|goshajapankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajapanshĂ«ro|gokishajapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajapanshĂ«mu|shajapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajapankshĂ«mu|goshajapankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajapanshĂ«mu|gokishajapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajapanronĂŒ|shajapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajapankronĂŒ|goshajapankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajapanronĂŒ|gokishajapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajapanroshĂ«|shajapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajapankroshĂ«|goshajapankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajapanroshĂ«|gokishajapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajapanromu|shajapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajapankromu|goshajapankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajapanromu|gokishajapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajapanmunĂŒ|shajapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajapankmunĂŒ|goshajapankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajapanmunĂŒ|gokishajapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajapanmushĂ«|shajapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajapankmushĂ«|goshajapankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajapanmushĂ«|gokishajapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajapanmuro|shajapanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajapankmuro|goshajapankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajapanmuro|gokishajapanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
